# blue

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for blue text.

```rad
blue(_item: any) -> str
```

```rad
blue("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the blue escape
blue(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the blue escape
```

## See also

`cyan`, `magenta`, `color_rgb`
